realPhotoPlausibility.notes: The sheet reads as plausible cafe/editorial photography with natural window light, shallow depth of field, and no obvious illustration artifacts.

identityContinuity.notes: The generated subject is visually consistent across variations, but final identity fidelity requires Huy approval against the original Bangkok source photos.

styleTransfer.notes: The output captures candid editorial cafe energy, muted warm color, practical daylight, and close personal framing. It is more cafe-focused and less broad-story/location-varied than the Grey reference set.

variationQuality.notes: The sheet contains 8 usable framing/pose variations without preserving the weak original selfie poses.

pipelineTraceability.notes: run-metadata.json records live Worker URL, redacted session token, pack id, R2 artifact key, provider route, Gateway id, source inputs, and completed uploads.

knownGaps: Huy approval is still required before treating this as final product quality.
The MVP route now awaits pack generation synchronously; a durable async runner is still needed before high-volume production.
Krea remains evaluation/fallback only and was not promoted into core ownership.
